product: Okta Support for Automatic Identity Management
tagline: Streamline user and group synchronization with Okta.
what_it_does: The Okta support for automatic identity management allows users and groups to be synchronized from Okta into Databricks without the need for SCIM provisioning. This feature enables direct searching for users and groups in identity federated workspaces, and Databricks utilizes Okta as the authoritative source for group memberships. It simplifies user management by automating the provisioning process and ensuring consistency across platforms.
why_it_matters: This update enhances operational efficiency by reducing manual user management tasks, thereby saving time and minimizing errors. Organizations can benefit from improved governance and compliance through centralized identity management, leading to better security and user access control. It is particularly valuable for enterprises with large user bases that require seamless integration between identity providers and data platforms.

capabilities.title: User Synchronization
capabilities.desc: Sync users and groups from Okta into Databricks automatically.

capabilities.title: Direct Search Functionality
capabilities.desc: Search for Okta users and groups directly within Databricks workspaces.

capabilities.title: Source of Record
capabilities.desc: Utilize Okta as the authoritative source for group memberships.

capabilities.title: Simplified Management
capabilities.desc: Eliminate the need for SCIM provisioning for user management.

use_cases: Large enterprises needing efficient user management.
Organizations requiring compliance with identity governance.
Teams managing multiple user groups across different workspaces.
limitations: Duplicate identities may occur if existing users lack Okta IDs.
Unified login is recommended for consistent SSO across workspaces.
Changes in Okta usernames may require support for migration.
Username uniqueness must be verified before onboarding.

steps.title: Set Up Okta Application
steps.desc: Create a new app integration in the Okta admin console.

steps.title: Configure Okta in Databricks
steps.desc: Log in and enter the necessary Okta configuration details.

steps.title: Test Connection
steps.desc: Verify the integration by testing the connection.

steps.title: Enable Automatic Identity Management
steps.desc: Activate the feature once the connection is successful.

steps.title: Monitor for Duplicates
steps.desc: Check for duplicate identities post-activation and resolve as needed.

key_takeaway: Okta support for automatic identity management streamlines user synchronization, enhancing efficiency and security for Databricks users.
